property.name: modalTitle
property.label: Modal Title
property.description: Component modal title.

property.name: modalIconName
property.label: Modal Icon Name
property.description: Component modal icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: iconSize
property.label: Icon Size
property.description: Enter the size of icon e.g small , medium and large.

property.name: paramOrderId
property.label: Order id
property.description: In case of portal enter the transaction order id paramater to fetch from URL, Eg {!orderId} or {!recordId}. In case of internal salesforce then left blank it will fetch the order id from lightning page. Else it will fetch all the draft order.

property.name: headerLabel
property.label: Transaction Order Header Label
property.description: Enter the name which will be displayed as prefix for transaction order

property.name: checkOutButtonLabel
property.label: Checkout Button Label
property.description: Enter the checkout button label.

property.name: clearAllButtonLabel
property.label: Clear All Button Label
property.description: Enter the name which will be displayed as label on the clear button label.

property.name: clearAllTransactionLineToastMessage
property.label: Clear All Toast Message
property.description: Enter the message which will be displayed when user click on clear all button.
property.default: All items for the transaction order were deleted successfully.

property.name: transactionLineFields
property.label: Transaction Line Item Fields
property.description: Hightlights panel fields in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: deleteIconName
property.label: Delete Button Icon Name
property.description: For displaying delete button icon enter the icon name e.g. action:delete.

property.name: isQuantityColumnEditable
property.label: Quantity Editable
property.description: This attribute will enable or disable editing quantity field.

property.name: quantityErrorMessage
property.label: Quantity Error Toast Message
property.description: Enter the message which will be displayed when quantity will be negative or in decimal.

property.name: tableTextDisplayMode
property.label: Table Text Display Mode
property.description: Supported options are: Wrap Text, Clip Text.

property.name: noTransactionOrderErrorMessage
property.label: No Transaction Order Error Message
property.description: Enter the message which will be displayed as error when no transaction order will be there.
property.default: No transaction order available or it has been submitted.

property.name: confirmationHeader
property.label: Remove Transaction Line Item Confirmation Title
property.description: Enter the confirmation title.

property.name: confirmationBoxBody
property.label: Remove Transaction Line Item Confirmation Message
property.description: Enter the confirmation message.
property.default: Are you sure you want to delete the item(s) from the order?

property.name: confirmationYesButtonLabel
property.label: Confirmation Yes Button Label
property.description: Text will be visible on the delete popup button.

property.name: confirmationNoButtonLabel
property.label: Confirmation No Button Label
property.description: Text will be visible on the delete popup button.

property.name: removeTransactionLineToastMessage
property.label: Remove Transaction Line Item Toast Message
property.description: Enter the message which will be displayed in toast body, when transaction line item is deleted

property.name: subTotalPriceLabel
property.label: Subtotal Price Label
property.description: Enter the subtotal price label. Leave it empty to hide the field.

property.name: discountPriceLabel
property.label: Discount Price Label
property.description: Enter the discount price label. Leave it empty to hide the field.

property.name: totalPriceLabel
property.label: Total Price Label
property.description: Enter the total price label. Leave it empty to hide the field.

property.name: additionalOrderFields
property.label: Additional Transaction Order Fields Name
property.description: Additional Transaction Order Fields to display on the summary section in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: paymentScreenSitePageName
property.label: Payment Screen Site Page Name
property.description: Enter the name of the redirection site page / full URL which you want to redirect to. Add {orderId} parameter which will be replaced with the related order id.

property.name: termsAndConditionsMode
property.label: Terms and Conditions Mode
property.description: The mode to show the Terms and Conditions.
property.datasource: None,Checkbox with Url,Custom Screen Flow Mode

property.name: termsAndConditionsUrlFlowName
property.label: Terms and Conditions URL/Flow Name
property.description: The full URL of the Terms and Conditions, or the flow name of the Terms and Conditions.

property.name: orderCustomCriteria
property.label: Order Custom Criteria
property.description: The custom criteria for listing transaction order e.g., reduivy__Status__c = 'Draft'.

property.name: enableDebugMode
property.label: Debug Mode
property.description: Enable debug mode in component.

property.name: basePath
property.label: Reserved For Internal Use 1
property.description: Enter the base path. Required if the component is in community page.

property.name: totalContainerStyling
property.label: Reserved For Internal Use 2
property.description: To define the styling of the container enter styling attributes here e.g. font-weight: 600;font-size: 14px;.

property.name: headerContainerStyling
property.label: Reserved For Internal Use 3
property.description: To define the styling of header container enter styling attributes here

property.name: footerContainerStyling
property.label: Reserved For Internal Use 4
property.description: To define the styling of header container enter styling attributes here

property.name: transactionLineTableLastColumnHeading
property.label: Reserved For Internal Use 5
property.description: Enter the name which will be displayed as heading of last column in the transaction line item table.

property.name: headerLabelCss
property.label: Reserved For Internal Use 6
property.description: To define the styling of the displaying heading enter styling attributes here e.g. font-weight: 600;font-size: 14px;.

property.name: saveErrorMessage
property.label: Reserved For Internal Use 7
property.description: Enter the message which will be displayed when error occured during checkout.
